name: Grilled Steak with Blue Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup blue cheese, crumbled, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white wine vinegar, water, soy sauce, sliced onion, crushed garlic, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Score the steak lightly on both sides.
3. Marinate the steak, covered, in the refrigerator for several hours or overnight.
4. Grill the steak on one side for 5 - 7 minutes.
5. Turn the steak and carefully top with crumbled blue cheese.
6. Cover and grill another 5 - 7 minutes, or until desired doneness.
